title: How do I request a registrar document?
answer: All official registrar requests must be submitted on-site at the Office of the University Registrar. HariKnows only tracks requests that were filed physically; it does not accept online requests.

title: What is the status flow for document requests?
answer: The standard request lifecycle is Pending, Prepared, Claimed, then Disposed. HariKnows reflects only records that were created on-site and tracked in the registrar database.

title: Can I use HariKnows without signing in?
answer: Yes. Guests can ask general questions and read published FAQs. Signed-in students can also see account-aware help and their own request history.

title: Can guests see account-specific request tracking?
answer: No. Account-specific request status and student-linked records are available only for signed-in users. Guests can access general FAQs and registrar guidance.
